rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Confirm spreadsheet cells contain formulas (not only documented arithmetic in the note) and include automated sanity-check cells that trigger flags in the workbook; verify workbook formulas directly since .xlsx parsing was not available here.
rubric_item_scores.notes: Thermal_note.md shows explicit calculations: P = 4.2 A * 1.2 V = 5.04 W; rise = 5.04 W * 34 C/W = 171.36 C; Tj = 50 C + 171.36 C = 221.36 C. Timing headrooms are computed correctly (67-30=37 ps, 50-37=13 ps). Sensitivity notes and heuristics are present. Calculations are internally consistent and numerically correct based on the provided inputs.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include explicit workbook formulas or cell references for the key computations (e.g., P cell formula, Tj formula) so verifiers can recompute directly from the spreadsheet. rubric_item_scores.notes: Thermal and timing intermediate calculations are present and numerically consistent: P = 4.2 A * 1.2 V = 5.04 W; rise = 5.04 W * 34 C/W = 171.36 C; Tj = 50 + 171.36 = 221.36 C. Timing headrooms computed correctly (67-30=37 ps, 50-37=13 ps) and skew/margin ratios reported. Validation/triage bands and cross-checks are provided. The note documents missing propagation model and marks calculations conditional where appropriate.
